title: Budget Template, Recurring Planner & Import Wizard QA
testingOrder: Start with Section 1 (Budget Template modal). Test both tabs. Then test the Import Wizard in Section 2. Section 3 covers cross-feature and edge cases.

groups.name: Opening & Tabs
items: Budget page shows 'Budget Template' button in header (desktop)
Budget page shows 'Budget Template' button in action row (mobile)
Click 'Budget Template' → modal opens with 'Monthly Amounts' tab active
Two tabs visible: 'Monthly Amounts' and 'Recurring Items'
Click 'Recurring Items' tab → switches content, tab styling updates
Click 'Monthly Amounts' tab → switches back
Modal renders as centered modal on desktop, bottom sheet on mobile
Close modal with X button → modal closes cleanly
Button is disabled for members without budgets.edit permission

groups.name: Monthly Amounts Tab — Display
items: Loading spinner shows while data fetches, then categories appear
Summary line shows Income / Expenses / Net totals at top
Net total is green when positive, red when negative
All income categories appear under 'Income' group header
All expense categories appear grouped by group_name
Group headers show group name and group total
Categories with a template amount show the formatted amount
Categories without a template amount show '—'

groups.name: Monthly Amounts Tab — Inline Editing
items: Click an amount or '—' → inline input appears with current value selected
Type a number and press Enter → saves, toast shows confirmation
Type a number and blur (click away) → saves
Press Escape → cancels edit, no save
Set amount to 0 or clear → template entry deleted, shows '—'
Summary totals and group totals update immediately after save
Mobile: numeric keyboard appears for amount input (inputMode=decimal)

groups.name: Recurring Items Tab — List View
items: If no recurring items → empty state message shown with '+ Add Item' button
Existing items shown in a list with label, category, amount, and month chips
Month chips show abbreviated month names (Jan, Feb, etc.)
Annual total shown (sum of amount × number of months per item)
Delete button uses ConfirmDeleteButton pattern
After delete → item removed, list refreshes, toast shown

groups.name: Recurring Items Tab — Add/Edit
items: Click '+ Add Item' → inline form replaces list content
Label field is required — submit without label shows validation
Category dropdown groups options by group_name (optgroups)
Amount field accepts decimal values
Month selector: click month chips to toggle on/off
At least one month required — submit without months shows validation
Submit with valid data → item created, form closes, list refreshes, toast shown
Click edit on existing item → inline form pre-fills all fields
Save edited item → updates item, form closes, list refreshes
Cancel form → returns to list without saving

groups.name: Recurring Items Tab — Calendar View
items: Toggle between List and Calendar views
Calendar view shows vertical layout: month header rows with items underneath
Only months with items are shown (empty months hidden)
Each item row shows label, category, and amount
Month headers show month name and monthly total

groups.name: Mobile
items: Modal renders as bottom sheet on mobile
Tab switching works on mobile
Scrollable content within the modal
Inline editing works on mobile with numeric keyboard
Add/edit form works within the bottom sheet (no nested modal)

groups.name: Opening & Data Loading
items: 'Import from Template' button visible on Budget page header (desktop and mobile)
Button is disabled for members without budgets.edit permission
Click button → wizard modal opens, data loaded from template + recurring + existing budget
If no template entries exist → Step 1 shows empty state with link that opens Budget Template modal

groups.name: Step 1 — Template Review
items: Step indicator shows 3 steps with first highlighted
Title shows 'Step 1 of 3 — Import Monthly Template'
Subtitle shows the month being imported into
Categories grouped by group_name with group headers
Desktop: column headers show Category, Template, Current, Action
Categories with no existing budget show green 'Add' badge
Categories WITH existing budget show conflict dropdown (Skip/Overwrite/Add)
Conflict dropdown defaults to 'Skip'
Bulk action dropdown at top: set all conflicts to Skip/Overwrite/Add at once
Click 'Next →' advances to Step 2

groups.name: Step 2 — Recurring Items
items: Title shows 'Step 2 of 3 — Recurring Items for {month}'
If no recurring items for this month → shows empty state with link that opens Budget Template modal
Each item has checkbox, label, category, amount input
Items with preset amounts show pre-filled input
Items without preset amounts show empty input with placeholder
Uncheck an item → it's excluded from import
'← Back' returns to Step 1 preserving all selections
'Next →' advances to Step 3

groups.name: Step 3 — Review & Apply
items: Title shows 'Step 3 of 3 — Review Changes'
Summary shows counts: adds, overwrites, skipped, recurring items included
Individual items listed showing what will happen (add/overwrite/recurring)
'← Back' returns to Step 2 preserving all selections
Click 'Apply Changes' → imports budget, toast shows results (X created, Y updated)
After apply: wizard closes, budget page refreshes with new values
Budget values on page match what was imported

groups.name: Edge Cases
items: Import into a month with zero existing budget → all template items are 'Add' (no conflicts)
Import into a month with ALL categories already budgeted → all template items show conflicts
Recurring item with null amount, user enters 0 → item not imported (skipped)
Cancel at any step → wizard closes, no changes made
Import same month twice → second import shows all conflicts (previous values exist)

groups.name: Data Consistency
items: Template amounts persist after closing and reopening modal
Recurring items persist after closing and reopening modal
Imported budget values show correctly on the main Budget page
Budget summary KPIs (Budgeted Income, Budgeted Expenses) reflect imported values
Owner filter on Budget page works correctly with imported values

groups.name: Dark Mode
items: Budget Template modal renders correctly in dark mode (both tabs)
Import wizard modal renders correctly in dark mode
All text readable, borders visible, inputs styled correctly in dark mode
Tab styling correct in dark mode (active/inactive states)

groups.name: Permissions
items: As admin/owner → Budget Template button and Import button are enabled
As member WITH budgets.edit → buttons are enabled
As member WITHOUT budgets.edit → both buttons are disabled (not hidden)
Template modal editing works only when user has budgets.edit permission
